mapper.select: /** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectList */ select a.sect_id , b.evl_step_id , a.sect_nm , b.evl_step_nm , a.evl_plan_id , c.online , c.evl_cmit_id , c.evl_cmit_nm , c.evl_table_id , c.mfcmm_co , c.evl_prarnde , c.begin_hour , c.end_hour , c.evl_place , c.orgnzr_id , c.evl_charmn_opinion_cn , c.evl_sttus_cd , c.evl_sttus_dt , c.slctn_dspth , c.slctn_dspth_dt , c.online , c.attachment_group_id from uspt_sect a inner join uspt_evl_step b on a.evl_plan_id = b.evl_plan_id left outer join uspt_evl_cmit c on a.sect_id = c.sect_id and b.evl_step_id = c.evl_step_id where a.evl_plan_id = #{evlPlanId}

/** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectCmitList */ select evl_cmit_id , sect_id , evl_step_id , evl_table_id , evl_cmit_nm , mfcmm_co , evl_prarnde , begin_hour , end_hour , evl_place , orgnzr_id , evl_charmn_opinion_cn , evl_sttus_cd , evl_sttus_dt , slctn_dspth , slctn_dspth_dt , online , attachment_group_id from uspt_evl_cmit where 1 = 1
and sect_id = #{sectId}

/** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectCmitDtaList */ select a.sect_id , a.evl_plan_id , b.evl_step_id , a.sect_nm , b.evl_step_nm , a.evl_plan_id , c.evl_cmit_id , c.evl_cmit_nm , c.evl_table_id , c.attachment_group_id from uspt_sect a inner join uspt_evl_step b on a.evl_plan_id = b.evl_plan_id left outer join uspt_evl_cmit c on a.sect_id = c.sect_id and b.evl_step_id = c.evl_step_id where a.evl_plan_id = #{evlPlanId}

/** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectEvlCmitExtrcTarget */ select c.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , b.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , a.rcept_odr || '차' as rcept_odr /*접수차수*/ , b.ordtm_rcrit /*상시모집여부*/ , case when b.ordtm_rcrit = true then '상시모집' else '정시모집' end as ordtm_rcrit_nm , c.bsns_nm , a.evl_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('EVL_TYPE', a.evl_type_cd) as evl_type_nm , d.sect_id , e.evl_step_id , d.sect_nm /*분과명*/ , e.evl_step_nm /*평가단계명*/ , d.evl_plan_id , f.evl_cmit_id /*평가위원회ID*/ , f.evl_cmit_nm /*위원회명*/ , f.evl_table_id , f.mfcmm_co /*위원수*/ , f.evl_prarnde /*평가예정일*/ , f.begin_hour , f.end_hour , f.evl_place /*평가장소*/ , f.orgnzr_id , fn_cmm_get_member(f.orgnzr_id) as orgnzr_nm /*간사명*/ , f.evl_charmn_opinion_cn , f.evl_sttus_cd , f.evl_sttus_dt , f.slctn_dspth , f.slctn_dspth_dt , f.online , f.attachment_group_id , case when g.mfcmm_extrc_id != '' then '추출완료' else '대기중' end as process_sttus_nm /*처리상태명*/ , h.evl_mthd_cd , row_number() over (order by f.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_evl_plan a /*평가계획*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc b /*사업공고*/ on a.pblanc_id = b.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns c /*사업*/ on b.bsns_cd = c.bsns_cd inner join uspt_sect d /*분과정보*/ on a.evl_plan_id = d.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_evl_step e /*평가단계*/ on a.evl_plan_id = e.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_evl_cmit f /*평가위원회*/ on d.sect_id = f.sect_id and e.evl_step_id = f.evl_step_id left outer join uspt_evl_mfcmm_extrc g /*평가위원추출*/ on f.evl_cmit_id = g.evl_cmit_id and g.odr_no = 1 inner join uspt_evl_table h on f.evl_table_id = h.evl_table_id where 1 = 1 and f.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId}

/** UsptEvlCmitDao.select */ select evl_cmit_id , sect_id , evl_step_id , evl_table_id , evl_cmit_nm , mfcmm_co , evl_prarnde , begin_hour , end_hour , evl_place , orgnzr_id , evl_charmn_opinion_cn , evl_sttus_cd , evl_sttus_dt , slctn_dspth , slctn_dspth_dt , online , attachment_group_id , slctn_sndng_mth , slctn_sndng_cn , slctn_sms_id , slctn_email_id , ptrmsn_dspth , ptrmsn_dspth_dt , ptrmsn_sndng_mth , ptrmsn_sndng_cn , ptrmsn_sms_id , ptrmsn_email_id , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_evl_cmit where evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId}
/** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectLoginCmitList */ select evl_cmit_nm , evl_cmit_id from uspt_evl_cmit where evl_prarnde = to_char(current_date,'yyyymmdd') and online is true

/** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectEvlSttusList */ select uec.evl_cmit_id , uet.evl_trget_id , ubpa.receipt_no , uet2.evl_mthd_cd , fn_cmm_get_member_nm(ubpa.member_id) as member_nm , sum(case when uein.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}' then ueira.evl_score else 0 end) as add_score , sum(case when uein.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}' then ueira.evl_score else 0 end) as sub_score , max(case when uein.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}' then ueira.evl_cn else '' end) as add_cn , max(case when uein.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}' then ueira.evl_cn else '' end) as sub_cn , row_number() over (order by ubpa.receipt_no) as rn from uspt_evl_cmit uec inner join uspt_evl_step ues on ues.evl_step_id = uec.evl_step_id inner join uspt_sect us on us.sect_id = uec.sect_id inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.sect_id = us.sect_id and uet.evl_step_id = ues.evl_step_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = uet.apply_id inner join uspt_evl_table uet2 on uet2.evl_table_id = uec.evl_table_id and uet2.enabled = true inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm uein on uein.evl_table_id = uet2.evl_table_id and uein.evl_div_cd in ('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}', '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}') left outer join uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr ueira on ueira.evl_cmit_id = uec.evl_cmit_id and ueira.evl_iem_id = uein.evl_iem_id and ueira.evl_trget_id = uet.evl_trget_id where uec.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} group by uec.evl_cmit_id, uet.evl_trget_id, ubpa.member_id, ubpa.receipt_no, uet2.evl_mthd_cd

/** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectEvlSttusMfcmmList */ select uem.evl_mfcmm_id , ue.expert_nm as evl_mfcmm_nm , sum(coalesce(ueir.evl_score, 0)) as evl_score , min(uemr.mfcmm_evl_sttus_cd) as mfcmm_evl_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MES_CODE_GROUP}', min(uemr.mfcmm_evl_sttus_cd)) as mfcmm_evl_sttus_nm from uspt_evl_cmit uec inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm uem on uem.evl_cmit_id = uec.evl_cmit_id inner join uspt_extrc_mfcmm uem2 on uem2.extrc_mfcmm_id = uem.extrc_mfcmm_id inner join uspt_expert ue on ue.expert_id = uem2.expert_id left outer join uspt_evl_mfcmm_result uemr on uemr.evl_mfcmm_id = uem.evl_mfcmm_id left outer join uspt_evl_iem_result ueir on ueir.evl_result_id = uemr.evl_result_id where uec.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and uemr.evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId} group by uem.evl_mfcmm_id, ue.expert_nm, uemr.evl_trget_id order by ue.expert_nm, uem.evl_mfcmm_id

/** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectEvlResultList */ select sub.* , (sub.avg_evl_score + sub.add_score - sub_score) as tot_evl_score , row_number() over (order by (sub.avg_evl_score + sub.add_score - sub_score) desc ) as rn from ( select uet.evl_trget_id , ubpa.receipt_no , uet2.evl_mthd_cd , uet.slctn , fn_cmm_get_member_nm(ubpa.member_id) as member_nm , sum(case when uein.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}' then ueira.evl_score else 0 end) as add_score , sum(case when uein.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}' then ueira.evl_score else 0 end) as sub_score , max(case when uein.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}' then ueira.evl_cn else '' end) as add_cn , max(case when uein.evl_div_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}' then ueira.evl_cn else '' end) as sub_cn , max(coalesce(ueir.evl_score, 0)) as max_evl_score , min(coalesce(ueir.evl_score, 0)) as min_evl_score , sum(coalesce(ueir.evl_score, 0)) as sum_evl_score , round(avg(coalesce(ueir.evl_score, 0)), 2) as avg_evl_score from uspt_evl_cmit uec inner join uspt_evl_step ues on ues.evl_step_id = uec.evl_step_id inner join uspt_sect us on us.sect_id = uec.sect_id inner join uspt_evl_trget uet on uet.sect_id = us.sect_id and uet.evl_step_id = ues.evl_step_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = uet.apply_id inner join uspt_evl_table uet2 on uet2.evl_table_id = uec.evl_table_id and uet2.enabled = true inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm uein on uein.evl_table_id = uet2.evl_table_id and uein.evl_div_cd in ('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivAdd}', '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@evlDivMinus}') left outer join uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr ueira on ueira.evl_cmit_id = uec.evl_cmit_id and ueira.evl_iem_id = uein.evl_iem_id and ueira.evl_trget_id = uet.evl_trget_id inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm uem on uem.evl_cmit_id = uec.evl_cmit_id and uem.atend_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@ATEND_STTUS_03_CODE}' left outer join uspt_evl_mfcmm_result uemr on uemr.evl_mfcmm_id = uem.evl_mfcmm_id and uemr.evl_trget_id = uet.evl_trget_id left outer join uspt_evl_iem_result ueir on ueir.evl_result_id = uemr.evl_result_id and ueir.evl_iem_id = uein.evl_iem_id where uec.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} group by uet.evl_trget_id, ubpa.member_id, ubpa.receipt_no, uet2.evl_mthd_cd ) sub order by tot_score desc

/** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectEvlPointList */ select uet.evl_mthd_cd , uein.evl_iem_id , uein.evl_iem_nm , uein.evl_iem_cn , uein.allot_score , ueira.evl_iem_result_adsbtr_id , ueira.evl_score , ueira.adsbtr_resn_cn , ueira.evl_cn from uspt_evl_cmit uec inner join uspt_evl_table uet on uet.evl_table_id = uec.evl_table_id inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm uein on uein.evl_table_id = uet.evl_table_id and uein.evl_div_cd = #{evlDivCd} left outer join uspt_evl_iem_result_adsbtr ueira on ueira.evl_iem_id = uein.evl_iem_id and ueira.evl_cmit_id = uec.evl_cmit_id and ueira.evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId} where uec.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId}

/** UsptEvlCmitDao.selectEvlTableList */ select uet.evl_mthd_cd , uein.evl_iem_nm , uein.evl_iem_cn , uein.allot_score , coalesce(ueir.evl_score, 0) as evl_score , coalesce(ueir.evl_cn, '') as evl_cn , uemr.evl_opinion from uspt_evl_cmit uec inner join uspt_evl_table uet on uet.evl_table_id = uec.evl_table_id inner join uspt_evl_iem_nm uein on uein.evl_table_id = uet.evl_table_id and uein.evl_div_cd = 'EVLD01' inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm uem on uem.evl_cmit_id = uec.evl_cmit_id inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm_result uemr on uemr.evl_mfcmm_id = uem.evl_mfcmm_id inner join uspt_evl_trget uet2 on uet2.evl_trget_id = uemr.evl_trget_id left outer join uspt_evl_iem_result ueir on ueir.evl_result_id = uemr.evl_result_id and ueir.evl_iem_id = uein.evl_iem_id where uec.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and uem.evl_mfcmm_id = #{evlMfcmmId} and uet2.evl_trget_id = #{evlTrgetId} order by uein.sort_ordr_no
